objective: Fix inflated unread counts + contact name cleanup
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: sync.service.ts overwrote CRM unread_count with WA API rc.unread_count on every sync causing massive inflation (19256 unread but only 114 messages). Fix: (A) Removed unread_count overwrite from both sync locations - CRM tracks unread via webhook increment+markAsRead reset (B) Reset all conversation unread_count to 0 in DB (C) Fixed contact name '.' for own number 6283803272911 to 'Adi Syahadi (Saya)'

tsc clean - Root cause: helmet() sets Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin on all responses. Browser blocks img/video/audio from loading cross-origin (localhost:5000 served to page at localhost:3002) with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin. Fix: override CORP header to cross-origin on both proxy and publicProxy media endpoints

objective: Fix contact name corruption - push_name from OUTGOING overwrites contact name
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: webhook _processMessageForInstance() used push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on ALL messages including OUTGOING. For OUTGOING messages push_name = OWN WA profile name (Adi Syahadi) not the contact's name. This caused 4 different contacts to all be named 'Adi Syahadi'. Fix: (A) Only use push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on INCOMING messages. For OUTGOING only use contact_name (WA address book). (B) Reset 4 corrupted contacts back to phone_number so they get correct name on next incoming message

objective: Handle relative media_url from WA API PATCH-063
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: WA API fix (PATCH-063) now returns relative media_url for OUTGOING media (e.g. /media/org-uuid/file.webp). CRM proxy threw 400 Invalid URL because new URL() fails on relative paths. Fix: (A) Both proxy and publicProxy resolve relative paths by prefixing with wa_api_base_url origin before SSRF check and fetch (B) sync.service.ts now backfills media_url on existing messages when WA API provides one that was previously null

objective: Fix broadcast media send failing - media_type case mismatch

All 5 recipients failed with VALIDATION_ERROR. Fix: sendMedia() now lowercases mediaType before sending to WA API. Single point of fix covers both broadcast and chat media sends

Pattern identik dgn scheduled-messages. No schema migration needed - broadcast resolve recipients at create time. No regression - existing manual-only flow tetap works.

verification_note: done
column6: Added getFollowUpTemplate/saveFollowUpTemplate to PaymentConfig pattern. GET/PUT /payment-settings/followup-template (SUPER_ADMIN). sendUpgradeFollowUp now reads template from DB with placeholder replacement ({name} {plan_name} {amount} {invoice_number} {expired_at} {bank_accounts}). Default template matches previous hardcoded message. Enabled toggle to disable follow-up.

verification_note: done
column6: New admin page with enable/disable toggle + textarea editor with placeholder reference grid + WA-style preview bubble. Added Template Follow-Up nav item to admin sidebar with MessageSquare icon.

verification_note: done
column6: requestUpgrade now accepts optional opts {userId phone}. If phone provided saves normalized phone to user profile before creating invoice. Route forwards req.user.userId + req.body.phone. Backward-compatible — opts param is optional. No regression on existing flow.

verification_note: done
column6: Added waPhone state pre-filled from user.phone. Added required WA phone input field in payment modal step confirm with placeholder and helper text. Confirm button disabled if phone empty. Phone sent in POST /invoices/request-upgrade body. Added Input+Label imports. No other flow affected.

files_changed: Fix SUPER_ADMIN blocked from settings update
verification_note: done
column6: Added SUPER_ADMIN to role checks in updateWaApiConfig (line 56) and updateOrganization (line 148). Previously only OWNER and ADMIN were allowed. No other guards affected. tsc clean.

verification_note: done
column6: Added SUPER_ADMIN bypass in authorize() middleware. If user.role is SUPER_ADMIN the role check is skipped. This structurally fixes all routes using authorize() — wa-instance CRUD+sync+delete and any future routes. Single line change. tsc clean.

verification_note: done
column6: Added early return in requireFeature() and checkQuota() for SUPER_ADMIN role. SUPER_ADMIN now bypasses all plan feature restrictions and quota limits. No regression — other roles still checked normally. tsc clean.

verification_note: done
column6: Created dedicated System Admin org (slug system-admin plan PROFESSIONAL max_users 100 max_contacts 999999). Moved SUPER_ADMIN user juned to this org. Added POST /admin/organizations/setup-admin-org endpoint for future use. SUPER_ADMIN no longer shares tenant org. User must re-login to get new JWT.

files_changed: Fix WA follow-up use SUPER_ADMIN org WA API instead of empty env vars
verification_note: done
column6: Root cause: sendUpgradeFollowUp relied on env.WA_API_KEY which was empty in Docker. Added getSystemWAClient() method that first checks SUPER_ADMIN org WA API config from DB (admin-configurable via Settings UI) then falls back to env vars. SUPER_ADMIN org already has WA API configured and tested. tsc clean.

column6: Added sendVerifiedFollowUp() fire-and-forget in verifyPayment(). New DB template (verified_wa_enabled + verified_wa_template) with DEFAULT_VERIFIED_TEMPLATE. Reuses getSystemWAClient(). New API: GET/PUT /payment-settings/verified-template (SUPER_ADMIN). Placeholders: {name} {plan_name} {amount} {invoice_number} {period_end}. tsc clean.
